message:
feat: implement evaluatePendingImprovements with rollback for harmful mutations

Evaluates pending improvements that have accumulated enough post-improvement
data (5+ actions). Helpful and neutral improvements are removed from pending.
Harmful improvements (stumble rate worsened >5%) trigger a git revert of the
mutation commit. Emits learn_mutation events for both evaluations and rollbacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
